summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KisanSetu agricultural advisory platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI loading correctly with all components present. Navigation partially blocked by overlay issue but core functionality verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay blocking navigation clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work, but normal user interaction blocked

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard-data returns weather data and 8 crops mandi prices
POST /api/advisory returns AI advisory with crop, lang, weather_context (Hindi/English tested)
POST /api/scan returns pest diagnosis with image_b64 (real test image used)
POST /api/yield returns yield estimate with crop, area_acres, lang
Home tab renders with greeting, voice hero mic button, alert banner, crop selector, 2x2 dashboard grid
Language switcher buttons present and functional (4 languages: en/hi/mr/kn)
Crop selector pills change active crop (8 crops available)
Market prices displaying with currency symbols and action advice
All UI components present with proper data-testid attributes
AI integration working with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Emergent badge overlay issue that blocks navigation clicks. Consider z-index adjustment or positioning to prevent interference with UI interactions.
